# Codec Bench

> Browser-only encoding and conversion tools. User input remains in the browser and is never transmitted.

Codec Bench provides free web utilities at https://codec64.com.

## Tools

- [Base64 Decode and Encode](https://codec64.com/): Convert plain text, Base64, and unpadded Base64url.
- [URL Encode and Decode](https://codec64.com/url): Encode or decode RFC 3986 components, full URIs, and form URL-encoded values.
- [Query Parameter Parser and Builder](https://codec64.com/query): Convert URL query parameters to JSON or build a query string from JSON.
- [JWT Decoder](https://codec64.com/jwt): Decode JWT headers and payloads without signature verification.
- [Python Literal to JSON Converter](https://codec64.com/python-json): Convert Python dictionaries from PDB or print output into JSON.
- [Z Time and Unix Timestamp Converter](https://codec64.com/timestamp): Convert UTC Z time, Unix seconds, and Unix milliseconds.
